name: pm-prd-assistant
description: AI Product Manager Assistant specializing in PRD writing, solution design, and B2B/Gov product prototyping. Built-in case library, checklists, and workflow engine for production-ready deliverables.

displayDescription.en: Specialized in B2B and government product design. Covers PRD writing, solution design, and prototype specs with built-in case library and checklists for review-ready deliverables.
displayDescription.zh: 专注B端与政务产品，覆盖PRD撰写、方案设计和原型规格，内置案例库与检查清单，输出可直接评审。

defaultInitPrompt.zh: 帮我搭一套产品知识库结构，这是我的工作区目录
defaultInitPrompt.en: Help me set up a product knowledge base structure, here's my workspace directory

quickPrompts.zh: 帮我搭一套产品知识库结构，这是我的工作区目录
